narrative:
Miami Twp township has 1,399 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
